chief_complaint: A post-partum patient presented with chest pain.
history: The patient had a recent history of childbirth and presented with chest pain, new ECG changes, and elevated biomarkers.
exam: No specific physical examination findings were reported.
labs: ECG showed ischemia, elevated troponin and NT pro BNP, elevated D-dimer levels, wall motion abnormalities on Echo, and a sac-like aneurysm of the left anterior descending artery (LAD) on chest computed tomography angiography.
correct_diagnosis: Acute coronary syndrome with LAD aneurysm
differentials: Acute coronary syndrome with LAD aneurysm
correct_ranking: Acute coronary syndrome with LAD aneurysm
